title: gentianella peruviana var. boliviana
intro: Gentianella peruviana var. boliviana, also known as Bolivian gentian, is a plant species belonging to the gentian family (Gentianaceae) that is native to the Andean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Gentianella peruviana var. boliviana include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and improve immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Bolivian gentian include tea infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which are typically taken to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, nausea, and other gastrointestinal issues.
